rationale: Top-of-form LLP name. Domestic LLP under 31 MRSA §825 — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The date of filing of its certificate of limited liability partnership was
rationale: Date the original LLP certificate (MLLP-1 registration) was filed with SOS — anchor for the renunciation timeline.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The reason for filing the certificate of renunciation is — line 1
rationale: Reason for renouncing LLP status (multi-line widget; line 1 of 3). Indexed lineN mirroring the upstream amendment.nature_and_text.lineN multi-line pattern.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The future effective date or time of renunciation, which must be a date or time certain, if it is not to be effective upon the filing of the certificate
rationale: Optional future effective date/time. If blank, renunciation is effective upon filing.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Other information, if any, that the person filing the certificate of renunciation determines to be necessary is set forth in Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for additional information (FOURTH).

label_verbatim: Authorized Signature(s)*: (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) [row 1]
rationale: First (primary) authorized individual signer's combined name+capacity (Shape D). Slot-1 follows the MLLC-17 convention of bare 'filing.signer' for the canonical primary signer (no '_1' suffix).
Second authorized individual signer (optional; used when the §825 tier requires multiple signers, e.g., majority-in-interest of partners). Same shape as MLLC-17.

label_verbatim: For Authorized Signature(s) on behalf of Entities: Name of Entity [row 1]
rationale: Name of an entity signing on behalf of the LLP (when the §825 authorized person is itself an entity, parallel to general_partner_entity_N.name on LP forms).

label_verbatim: By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) [entity row 1]
rationale: Printed name + capacity of the natural person signing for entity-signer 1.

label_verbatim: By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) [entity row 2]
By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) [entity row 3]
Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

rationale: Total fees (base $75 per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
